name: coordinated-debunk-engine
description: Deep investigative fact-checking and debunking of high-priority malicious claims using multi-source verification.

steps.name: deconstruct-claim
steps.prompt_template: Decompose the high-priority claim: {{input}} into 5-10 specific sub-questions that can be empirically verified. For each sub-question, specify the ideal source type (academic, official record, primary witness, statistical dataset).

steps.name: deep-evidence-gathering
steps.prompt_template: Perform an exhaustive search for each sub-question in {{sub_questions}}. Cross-reference at least 15 independent authoritative sources. Prioritize primary sources, academic research, and verified official records. Include Slovak/Czech language sources where relevant.

steps.name: source-integrity-check
steps.prompt_template: Audit the provenance and integrity of all sources in {{gathered_evidence}}. Flag sources that are: known disinformation outlets, expired/dead links, WHOIS-anonymous domains registered after the event, screenshot-only evidence with no primary URL, or circular citations (source A cites source B which cites source A). Output a per-source integrity verdict.

steps.name: cross-check-diversity
steps.prompt_template: Independently evaluate the integrity-audited evidence: {{integrity_audited_evidence}}. Flag any claims where the evidence is weak, contradictory, or where a single source is over-relied upon. Provide a dissenting analysis where applicable.

steps.name: craap-verification
steps.prompt_template: Evaluate the cross-checked evidence: {{cross_checked_evidence}} using the CRAAP methodology (Currency, Relevance, Authority, Accuracy, Purpose). Produce a CRAAP score per source and identify contradictions or false premises in the original claim.

steps.name: qa-review
steps.prompt_template: Review the verified facts {{verified_facts}} for logical consistency, completeness of rebuttal, and accuracy of CRAAP scores. Verify all cited claims trace back to integrity-checked sources from {{integrity_audited_evidence}}. Flag any logical gaps that would weaken the debunking report.

steps.name: generate-debunking-report
steps.prompt_template: Synthesize the QA-verified facts: {{qa_verified_facts}} into a comprehensive debunking report. Include a 'Lies Detected' section, a point-by-point rebuttal, and a full bibliography of cited sources in APA format. Output in both Slovak and English.
